notes: Sprint 4 planning due Sunday 2026-05-18. Theme driven by P2 governance gate work identified in TKT-0137.

candidateItems.title: Sandbox Runbook v1 — Ken Formal Review
candidateItems.rationale: Ken review of comprehensive sandbox runbook before shipping. Day 1 of Sprint 4.

candidateItems.rationale: Current guardrails doc is a named-agent snapshot. Must restructure before any new agent joins fleet.

candidateItems.rationale: Minor patch to approved doc before P2 sprint. Low effort.
